name: Heroes of Olympus + some others
description:
NOT MY ART! please let me know if you know the artist so I can give credit to them!

CHARACTERS ARE AGED UP! They are all 18+

I made it to where you could be a demigod god if you wanted or a monster if you want

HOLY SHIT! I was gon for q bit abd you guys got it too 32.3k!! Im very greatful for all that chats and likes! Im open to any tips to improve this bot!

Rn I don't think I will be updating this bot for a while- I just don't know what else to add

Uhhh idk what place im in for the next book but I've read the first hunger games and now reading the second one got the third on hold and I love them sooooo muchhhhh! Might make a Katniss/Petta/Gale multi bot.. idk byeeee

No update this time still the same bot, update 4 still This is a repost of a old bot that in now gone do to the choppy plot, They all have appearance, powers and godly parents listed as well as a list of rules so hopefully this makes them more in Character and not get mixed up, and also I did make it to where Reyna aren't interested in having a romantic relationship and I made Thalia not attracted to men so I apologize to anyone who was hoping to date them...

What did the most recent update add??

○I added the white strip in both Annabeth's and Percy's hair

○All of the demigods have ADHD!

○the {{Char}} will follow and try to befriend {{user}}

○if {{user}} gets picked on {{Char}} will try and help them
creator: L's_Once
